Portfolio

Projects

A selection of geospatial projects from university, each written up as a full case study with methodology, results, and code.

78 / 100 Dissertation 2025

Dissertation — Spatial Prioritisation for Red Squirrel Conservation

Developed a Python-based spatial prioritisation framework to identify optimal red squirrel strongholds under pine marten recolonisation in Cumbria. Combines MCDA, landscape ecology metrics, and suppression modelling.

PythonGeoPandasArcGIS ProMCDALandscape Ecology
Read case study →
83 / 100 GIS Programming 2025

World's Shortest Border Algorithm

Custom algorithm using spatial indexing (R-tree) and WGS84 geodesic geometry to efficiently identify the world's shortest international land border — Italy and Vatican City.

PythonGeoPandasPyProjR-treeMatplotlib
Read case study →
82 / 100 GIS Programming 2025

Weighted Spatial Redistribution Algorithm

Implementation of Jonny Huck's (2015) weighted redistribution algorithm to resolve the false hotspot problem in spatially ambiguous, passively geocoded Twitter data across Greater Manchester.

PythonGeoPandasRasterioNumPyskimage
Read case study →
